name: AcreetionOS (Cinnamon)
summary: The official AcreetionOS release with Cinnamon desktop
description: AcreetionOS is a user-friendly Arch-based distribution featuring the Cinnamon desktop environment and XLibre stability.

name: AcreetionOS XL (XLibre)
summary: Official XLibre edition with enhanced hardware compatibility
description: AcreetionOS XL features the XLibre display protocol with enhanced hardware compatibility and additional drivers out of the box.
